chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.1092 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 19.05.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Mr. Hafiz Abdul Rahim, advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Usman Farooq, counsel for applicant, states that latter is busy before another Bench. However, after arguing the bail application at some length, under instructions, he does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction to the learned trial Court for early disposal of the case. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded no objection on such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed on merits. However, learned trial Court is directed to decide the case of applicant expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
